config.crowdcontrol.title: Crowd Control
config.crowdcontrol.announce.name: Announce Effects
config.crowdcontrol.announce.description: Whether to post an alert in chat when an effect has been activated.
config.crowdcontrol.hide_names.name: Name Visibilty
config.crowdcontrol.hide_names.descripti: Determines where to show the names of viewers who have purchased effects.
config.crowdcontrol.global.name: Share Effects
config.crowdcontrol.global.description: Enables global mode which applies incoming effects to every player on the world.
config.crowdcontrol.hosts.name: Hosts
config.crowdcontrol.hosts.description: Specify other players that are allowed to use server-wide effects like setting the server difficulty. Can be Minecraft usernames, UUIDs, Crowd Control usernames, or Crowd Control IDs. Irrelevant with Share Effects enabled.
config.crowdcontrol.soft_lock.name: Soft-Lock Detector
config.crowdcontrol.soft_lock.descriptio: Detects and prevents players getting stuck in a death loop by removing nearby sources of damage.
config.crowdcontrol.soft_lock.period.des: How long the monitoring period is, in seconds.
config.crowdcontrol.soft_lock.deaths.des: How many deaths must be observed during the monitoring period to trigger.
config.crowdcontrol.soft_lock.radius.des: Radius to search for damage sources.
config.crowdcontrol.hosts_bypass.name: Hosts Bypass Limits
config.crowdcontrol.hosts_bypass.descrip: Whether users listed in the Hosts config are excluded from any limits defined below.
config.crowdcontrol.default_item_limit.d: Default limit for how many players can receive one Give Item effect. 0 is unlimited. Applicable only to sessions with multiple linked players.
config.crowdcontrol.item_limit.name: Item Limits
config.crowdcontrol.item_limit.descripti: Individual limits for how many players can receive one Give Item effect. 0 is unlimited. Applicable only to sessions with multiple linked players.
config.crowdcontrol.default_entity_limit: Default limit for how many players can receive one Summon/Remove Entity effect. 0 is unlimited. Applicable only to sessions with multiple linked players.
config.crowdcontrol.entity_limit.name: Entity Limits
config.crowdcontrol.entity_limit.descrip: Individual limits for how many players can receive one Summon/Remove Entity effect. 0 is unlimited. Applicable only to sessions with multiple linked players.
config.crowdcontrol.advanced_settings: Custom Effects can be defined in the mod's config file.
config.crowdcontrol.missing: Please install Yet Another Config Lib to visually configure the config, or manually edit the crowdcontrol.conf file.
